summary: Frontend-only retest after Playful Neo-Retro redesign + new /work/:id project detail flow. 69/69 Playwright assertions passed across home, services, portfolio, process, testimonials, contact, sticky-WA, footer, smooth-scroll nav, project detail (kairo), next-project flow (kairo->brava), back-to-work, invalid project redirect, /previews route, mobile menu @375, and no horizontal overflow @375/768/1024/1440. 0 console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: siteConfig.calendlyUrl ('https://calendly.com/your-studio/intro'), whatsappNumber ('15551234567') and email ('hello@yourstudio.com') are still placeholders — must be replaced with real client values before production launch.

Three pairs of duplicated Unsplash/Pexels testimonial portraits exist if portfolio expands; current 3 testimonials each use unique images, but ProjectPreview cards rely on stylised SVG/CSS mocks (no real images) which is intentional and works well.
ProjectDetail.jsx uses Navigate to '/' for unknown ids — this is a hard redirect (replace=true) and works correctly, but consider showing a soft 404 page for SEO/UX in future.
tech-stack pills use `data-testid={`tech-${t}`}` where t is the literal tech name (e.g. 'Next.js'). Dots/spaces in test-ids work but are unconventional; safe for current use.
Sticky WhatsApp pill (bottom-right) overlaps visually with the 'Made with Emergent' badge in preview environment only — not a code bug; will resolve in production deploy.
seed_data_creation: None — static site, all data is in /app/frontend/src/lib/siteConfig.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static React marketing/portfolio site (no backend integration on UI). Routes: / (Home), /work/:id (ProjectDetail), /previews (DesignPreviews). Project ids: northline, kairo, brava, halden, orsino, mellow. Verified data-testids: home-page, hero-section, hero-calendly-btn, hero-whatsapp-btn, services-section, service-card-01..06, portfolio-section, project-card-{id}, process-step-01..04, testimonial-0..2, contact-calendly-btn, contact-whatsapp-btn, faq-0..2, sticky-whatsapp, site-footer, footer-instagram/linkedin/x/email, nav-link-{work|services|process|contact}, nav-mobile-toggle + nav-mobile-{work|services|process|contact}, project-detail-{id}, feature-0..5, project-visit, detail-calendly, detail-whatsapp, next-project, back-to-work, design-previews-page. Calendly: https://calendly.com/your-studio/intro; WhatsApp: https://wa.me/15551234567. Mobile menu opens at width<768 via nav-mobile-toggle. Smooth scroll from /work/:id back to home anchor confirmed working via ScrollToTopOrAnchor in App.js.
